'''thazhungu''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:dynein|dynein]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| th-zh-ng
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:dynein|dynein]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| thazhungu
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thæzhingith|thæzhingith]] || [[word:thæzhingij|thæzhingij]] || [[word:thæzhingish|thæzhingish]] || [[word:thæzhingi|thæzhingi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thazhuzhunguth|thazhuzhunguth]] || [[word:thazhuzhunguj|thazhuzhunguj]] || [[word:thazhuzhungush|thazhuzhungush]] || [[word:thazhuzhungu|thazhuzhungu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thazhunguth|thazhunguth]] || [[word:thazhunguj|thazhunguj]] || [[word:thazhungush|thazhungush]] || [[word:thazhungu|thazhungu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thazhufnguth|thazhufnguth]] || [[word:thazhufnguj|thazhufnguj]] || [[word:thazhufngush|thazhufngush]] || [[word:thazhufnguf|thazhufnguf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:thazhunguthu|thazhunguthu]] || [[word:thazhunguju|thazhunguju]] || [[word:thazhungushu|thazhungushu]] || [[word:thazhunguku|thazhunguku]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:thazhunguth|thazhunguth]] || [[word:thazhunguj|thazhunguj]] || [[word:thazhungush|thazhungush]] || [[word:thazhungu|thazhungu]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:thazhunguthul|thazhunguthul]] || [[word:thazhungujul|thazhungujul]] || [[word:thazhungushul|thazhungushul]] || [[word:thazhungukul|thazhungukul]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:thazhunguthuthu|thazhunguthuthu]] || [[word:thazhungujuju|thazhungujuju]] || [[word:thazhungushushu|thazhungushushu]] || [[word:thazhunguku|thazhunguku]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:thazhunguthun|thazhunguthun]] || [[word:thazhungujun|thazhungujun]] || [[word:thazhungushun|thazhungushun]] || [[word:thazhungukun|thazhungukun]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:thazhunguthuoro|thazhunguthuoro]] || [[word:thazhungujuoro|thazhungujuoro]] || [[word:thazhungushuoro|thazhungushuoro]] || [[word:thazhungukuoro|thazhungukuoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|c715ec1}}
